# Security Policy

## Supported versions

Only the latest published version receives security updates. If you're on an
older version, update before reporting:

```bash
sf plugins update
```

## Reporting a vulnerability

**Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public issues.**

Use GitHub's private vulnerability reporting:
**[Report a vulnerability](https://github.com/sfship/plugin-ship/security/advisories/new)**.
This opens a private draft advisory visible only to you and the maintainers.

We'll acknowledge your report as soon as we can and keep you posted on the fix.
Please give us a reasonable window to address the issue before any public
disclosure.
